content:
# Type 2 Fuzzy Logic

**Summary**: An advanced fuzzy logic system that handles uncertainty and ambiguity in data more effectively than standard Type-1 fuzzy logic.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2014]] implemented type-2 fuzzy logic (T2F) to predict water saturation as an alternative to SVM.
